reviews.review_description: Suprisingly fun game! tbh for free its a steal! love games from small developers like this

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback!
Glad you enjoyed. I am currently making fan inspired levels that will feature fan's names on the wall! Feel free to throw out an idea!

reviews.review_description:
This game is good and fun. But here are some recommendations that would make the game more fun. 
1. Hand￼ poses/animation The game would look a lot better with hand poses.
2. The maps don’t look ￼really hype. There fun but maybe make it more outside looking and more colorful ￼￼
3. Maybe add arms or character. I don’t really like floating hands.
4. This game looks a lot like a multiplayer game. It’s really fun and a lot of potential 
Thank you for reading my review. 

-Birb

developer_response.body:
Birb, thanks for the feedback! 
Great suggestions, the hands used to be animated but I took it off to simplify the integration to multiplayer. Stay tuned!
As for the levels, Course 2 is much more hype in my opinion. Still not bright colors but I will take that into consideration.
If you'd like to suggest a level to be featured in Course 3, I'll do my best to bring your vision to life and even put "Birb's" Level on the wall!

reviews.review_description: The gameplay is very simple, but feels okay throwing the bowling ball. What lets the game down is the poor level design - really basic levels and not interesting to play.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback.. based on this I'm assuming you must not have tried course 2 or 3?
Course one is basic and simple level design to get a feel for the game. The other courses are much more challenging!
Glad you enjoyed! Stay tuned for the next update, going to be a good one!

reviews.review_description: This game is amazing for a free game, I would definitely pay at least $5-10 for this but it is free. The prices for the courses are also fairly priced and I will definitely be purchasing them
